B0001.lyrics: Everytime I think that I'm the only one who's lonely

B0003.lyrics: And every now and then I spend my time at rhyme and verse

B0004.lyrics: and curse those faults in me.

B0005.lyrics: And then along comes Mary (Mary, Mary)

B0007.lyrics: And does she want to give me

B0008.lyrics: kicks, and be my steady chick

B0009.lyrics: and give me pick of mem..or..ies?

B0011.lyrics: rather gather tales from all the fails

B0012.lyrics: and tribulations no one ever sees?

B0013.lyrics: When we met I was sure out to lunch,

B0014.lyrics: Now my empty cup tastes as sweet as

B0017.lyrics: When vague desire is the fire in the eyes of chicks,

B0018.lyrics: whose sickness is the games they play

B0022.lyrics: at who is most to blame today.

B0023.lyrics: And then along comes Mary (Mary, Mary)

B0025.lyrics: And does she want to set them free,

B0027.lyrics: From where she got her name.

B0029.lyrics: struggle much when told that such a tender

B0030.lyrics: touch of hers will make them not the same?

B0031.lyrics: When we met I was sure out to lunch,

B0032.lyrics: Now my empty cup tastes as sweet as

B0035.lyrics: And when the morning of the warning's passed,

B0036.lyrics: the gassed and flaccid kids are flung across the stars.

B0037.lyrics: The psychodramas and the traumas gone

B0038.lyrics: the songs are left unsung and hung upon the scars.

B0039.lyrics: And then along comes Mary. (Mary, Mary)

B0041.lyrics: And does she want to see the stains,

B0043.lyrics: all the pains she left the night before?

B0044.lyrics: Or will their waking eyes, reflect the lies,

B0045.lyrics: and make them realize their urgent cry for

B0047.lyrics: When we met I was sure out to lunch,

B0048.lyrics: Now my empty cup tastes as

B0051.lyrics: When we met I was sure out to lunch,

B0052.lyrics: Now my empty cup tastes as sweet as the punch.
